testing_centers.notes: ASCP administers exams through its own online computer-based examination (CBE) platform; not administered via Pearson VUE

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match ASCP BOC registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book computer-based examination. On-screen calculator provided for applicable questions. Score scale 100–999; passing score is 400 for most credentials. Exams administered through ASCP's own online platform.
renewal_options: 3-year recertification cycle. Recertification requires 36 CE credits per 3-year cycle. CE must be in laboratory medicine or related clinical science. Recertification application submitted through ASCP BOC portal.

prerequisites.description: Bachelor's degree from an accredited histotechnology program, or combination of education and histology laboratory experience per ASCP route requirements

retake_policy.notes: Candidates must wait 90 days between attempts. Maximum of 6 total attempts per credential. Full exam fee required for each attempt.

official_study_resources.title: ASCP BOC Exam Content Guidelines
official_study_resources.notes: Free content guidelines per credential available on ASCP BOC website

official_study_resources.title: ASCP BOC Practice Exams
official_study_resources.notes: Official ASCP practice exams sold through ASCP marketplace
